params.name: Madame Bovary
params.description: Flaubert’s realist masterpiece tells of Emma, a farmer’s wife consumed by romantic fantasy. Trapped in debt and infidelity, she spirals into ruin. With surgical prose, Flaubert exposed the spiritual void of 19th-century provincial France. The novel, once tried for immorality, became a landmark of psychological realism.
